_comment: Lighthouse CI gates. We intentionally DO NOT use `lighthouse:no-pwa` (or any other preset) because the presets enable dozens of *-insight diagnostic audits as `error`. Many of those flag dependency-side artefacts (Clerk SDK polyfills triggering legacy-javascript-insight, Netlify CDN redirects triggering `redirects`, third-party scripts triggering network-dependency-tree-insight) that we can't fix without architectural rewrites. The category-level gates below (performance / accessibility / best-practices / seo) are the user-facing measure and that's what we hold the bar to. Individual audits are explicit rather than imported from a preset.
